name: io.github.jamiew/spotify-mcp
description: MCP server connecting LLMs to Spotify, with smart-batching and large-playlist tools
title: Spotify

environmentVariables.name: SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Spotify app Client ID from developer.spotify.com

environmentVariables.name: SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Spotify app Client Secret from developer.spotify.com

environmentVariables.name: SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI
environmentVariables.description: OAuth redirect URI registered in your Spotify app
